SEARCH

Uses of Interface
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered.StateDistance

Packages that use StateDistance
Package
Description
org.ddolib.examples.layered.knapsack
This package implements the acs, astar, awastar and ddo models for the Knapsack Problem (KS).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.maximumcoverage
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Maximum Coverage problem.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.mks
The Multidimensional Knapsack Problem (MKP) is a generalization of the KP to multiple capacity constraints: $n$ items and $m$ dimensions of the knapsack are given, each dimension with capacity bound $(C_1,\ldots ,C_m)$.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.talentscheduling
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Talent Scheduling problem (talentSched).
org.ddolib.modeling.layered
This package contains the interfaces and abstract classes that must be implemented as problem specific classes to model a problem.It also contains default implementation.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered
 

  • Uses of StateDistance in org.ddolib.examples.layered.knapsack

    Classes in org.ddolib.examples.layered.knapsack that implement StateDistance
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    KSDistance
    Distance measure for states in a Knapsack (KS) problem.

  • Uses of StateDistance in org.ddolib.examples.layered.maximumcoverage

    Classes in org.ddolib.examples.layered.maximumcoverage that implement StateDistance
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MaxCoverDistance
    Distance function for MaxCoverState used to measure similarity between states in the context of the Maximum Coverage problem.

  • Uses of StateDistance in org.ddolib.examples.layered.mks

    Classes in org.ddolib.examples.layered.mks that implement StateDistance
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MKSDistance
    Computes a normalized distance between Multi-dimensional Knapsack (MKS) states.

  • Uses of StateDistance in org.ddolib.examples.layered.talentscheduling

    Classes in org.ddolib.examples.layered.talentscheduling that implement StateDistance
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TSDistance
    State distance for Talent Scheduling based on the symmetric difference of remaining scenes.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default StateDistance<T>
    DdoModel.stateDistance()
     
    final StateDistance<T>
    ExactModel.stateDistance()
     
    default StateDistance<T>
    LnsModel.stateDistance()
    Returns a measure of distance between two states.

  • Uses of StateDistance in org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered

    Constructors in org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered with parameters of type StateDistance
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    GHP(StateDistance<T> distance)
    Constructs a GHP reduction strategy with a default random seed.
     
    GHP(StateDistance<T> distance, long seed)
    Constructs a GHP reduction strategy with a specified random seed.
     
    Hybrid(StateRanking<T> ranking, StateDistance<T> distance)
    Constructs a Hybrid reduction strategy with default alpha (0.5) and seed.
     
    Hybrid(StateRanking<T> ranking, StateDistance<T> distance, double alpha, long seed)
    Constructs a Hybrid reduction strategy with specified ranking, distance, alpha, and seed.
